Index.description: Listen to music together with friends.
Index.join_description: Enter a 4-digit code to join an existing session.
Index.join_error_not_found: Room not found. Please check the code.

Index.create_error: Failed to create room. Please try again.

TutorialModal.title: JukeRoom
TutorialModal.description:
It's a service where you can enjoy music
together with people in the same space! 🎵
TutorialModal.host_desc: Create a new room through 'Create Room' and play music by using the current device as a speaker.
TutorialModal.guest_desc: Enter the 4-digit code provided by the host to join the room. Then, you can freely search and add songs you want to hear from your own smartphone.
TutorialModal.listen_desc: Added songs are registered in the playlist and played in order. Listen to your favorite music together!
